title: First YouTube Live
excerpt: I had the pleasure of chatting with Marly Bird on her podcast and it was actually live on YouTube! Though I can't really watch myself again, I thought you might like seeing it. You could even just listen to it…
body:
I had the pleasure of chatting with Marly Bird on her podcast and it was actually live on YouTube! Though I can't really watch myself again, I thought you might like seeing it. You could even just listen to it instead of watching it because all you'll see is my weird hand motions and facial expressions. Ha. She was so fun to talk with and it was inspiring to hear about her journey as well! Plus she's giving away a copy of Craft a Life You Love! 

Have a listen to the show here and let me know in the comments if you think I should try a YouTube live from the studio for just a crafty chat sometime.
